description: Wear these lightweight Hispana floaters from adidas with your shorts and tees this summer. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail.UpperSynthetic straps on the forefoot, collar and ankle, with velcro fastners for the forefoot and ankle straps to attain a snug FitPadded inner lining for the straps for greater comfortPrinted logo on the forefoot and ankle strapCushioned footbed with slightly elevated triangle and bee hive pattern for a soft massage feel and all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs and Water Grip for durability, grip and tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfort
